fields.name: Name
fields.intel_naics: North American Industry Classification System Code (AI)
fields.intel_osha_violations: Occupational Safety and Health Administration Violations (AI)
fields.gbLifeAdCarrier: Group Benefits Life and Accidental Death and Dismemberment Carrier
fields.next_x_date_lob: Next Renewal X-Date Line of Business
fields.gapAutoUm: Coverage Gap: Automobile Uninsured and Underinsured Motorist

messages.unsubscribed: You have been unsubscribed from our mailing list.

tooltips.excludingTargetLists: Targets that should not receive messages.

messages.groupMoveOutNoEditAccess: Cannot move out from group folder. No edit access to email.
messages.groupMoveToNoEditAccess: Cannot move to group folder. No edit access to email.
messages.groupMoveToTrashNoEditAccess: Cannot move email from group folder to trash. No edit access to email.
messages.groupMoveToArchiveNoEditAccess: Cannot move from group folder to Archive. No edit access to email.
messages.alreadyImported: The [email]({link}) already exists in the system.
messages.removeSelectedRecordsConfirmation:
Are you sure you want to remove selected emails?

They will be removed for other users too.
messages.removeRecordConfirmation:
Are you sure you want to remove the email?

It will be removed for other users too.
messages.confirmInsertTemplate: The email body will be lost. Are you sure you want to insert the template?

tooltips.oneOff: Check if you are going to use this template only once. E.g. for Mass Email.

messages.inIdle: Execute in idle (for big data; via cron)
messages.revert: This will remove all imported records permanently.
messages.removeDuplicates: This will permanently remove all imported records that were recognized as duplicates.
messages.confirmRevert: This will remove all imported records permanently. Are you sure?
messages.confirmRemoveDuplicates: This will permanently remove all imported records that were recognized as duplicates. Are you sure?
messages.confirmRemoveImportLog: This will remove the import log. All imported records will be kept. You won't be able to revert import results. Are you sure?
messages.removeImportLog: This will remove the import log. All imported records will be kept. Use it if you are sure that import is fine.

tooltips.manualMode: If checked, you will need to run import manually from CLI. Command will be shown after setting up the import.
tooltips.silentMode: A majority of after-save scripts will be skipped, stream notes won't be created. Import will run faster.

tooltips.portals: Article will be available only in specified portals.

tooltips.aiSummary: Pre-call intel from Manus prospect intelligence pack
tooltips.intelPackRun: Checked when Manus prospect-intelligence-pack has run for this lead
tooltips.xDate: Expiration date of current policy — used for nurture loop automation
tooltips.callbackDate: Auto-calculated callback date (Commercial: 90 days prior; Personal: 30 days prior).
tooltips.sourceOpportunity: Closed Lost opportunity this nurture lead came from.

messages.sendInvitationsToSelectedAttendees: Invitation emails will be sent to the selected attendees.
messages.sendCancellationsToSelectedAttendees: Cancellation emails will be sent to the selected attendees.

tooltips.closeDate: Projected/target date you expect to bind. The actual outcome date is captured by Effective/Bind Date (won) or Renewal X-Date (lost).
tooltips.fein: Enter if Account not yet created
tooltips.commissionLogged: Auto-set by n8n when commission ledger entry created
tooltips.aiSummary: 2-3 sentence brief from Manus intel — pre-call context
tooltips.recycleToLead: Enable to recycle this closed-lost opportunity into Lead nurture.
tooltips.xDate: Customer renewal date used for callback timing.
tooltips.callbackDate: Auto-calculated callback date (Commercial: 90 days prior; Personal: 30 days prior).
tooltips.recycledLead: Lead record created for nurture follow-up.
tooltips.aggregatePageId: Legacy Notion sync field — can be deprecated after full EspoCRM migration
tooltips.propAssessmentNotes: AI-generated property assessment notes from Viktor or Manus
tooltips.autoAssessmentNotes: AI-generated driver and vehicle risk assessment
tooltips.quoteNumber: Carrier-provided quote reference number for this opportunity.

tooltips.workingTimeCalendar: A calendar will be applied to users who have this team set as a Default Team.
tooltips.layoutSet: Provides the ability to have layouts that differ from the standard ones. Layout Set will be applied to users who have this team set as Default Team.
tooltips.roles: Access roles. Users of this team obtain access control level from the specified roles.
tooltips.positionList: Positions available in this team. For example, Salesperson, Manager.

tooltips.filename:
An optional filename. Entity attributes can be used as placeholders.

Additional placeholder:
- `{{today}}`

Example:
`Document_{{today}}_{{name}}`
tooltips.variables: Copy-paste needed placeholder to Header, Body or Footer.

fields.name: Name
fields.title: Title
fields.sendAccessInfo: Send Email with Access Info to User

tooltips.defaultTeam: All records created by this user will be related to this team by default.
tooltips.isActive: If unchecked, then the user won't be able to log in.
tooltips.teams: Teams which this user belongs to. Access control level is inherited from team's roles.
tooltips.roles: Additional access roles. Use it if user doesn't belong to any team or you need to extend access control level exclusively for this user.
tooltips.portalRoles: Additional portal roles. Use it to extend access control level exclusively for this user.
tooltips.portals: Portals which this user has access to.
tooltips.layoutSet: Layouts from the specified layout set will be applied for the user. The default layouts will be overridden.

messages.2faMethodNotConfigured: The 2FA method is not fully configured in the system.
messages.loginAs: Open the login link in an incognito window to preserve your current session. Use your admin credentials to log in.
messages.sendPasswordChangeLinkConfirmation: An email with a unique link will be sent to the user allowing them to change their password. The link will expire after a specific amount of time.
messages.passwordRecoverySentIfMatched: Assuming the entered data matched any user account.
messages.passwordStrengthLength: Must be at least {length} characters long.
messages.passwordStrengthSpecialCharacterCount: Must contain at least {count} special character(s).
messages.passwordStrengthBothCases: Must contain letters of both upper and lower case.
messages.passwordWillBeSent: Password will be sent to user's email address.
messages.emailAddressCantBeEmpty: Email Address can not be empty
messages.uniqueLinkHasBeenSent: The unique URL has been sent to the specified email address.
messages.setupSmtpBefore: You need to setup [SMTP settings]({url}) to make the system be able to send password in email.
messages.choose2FaSmsPhoneNumber: Select a phone number that will be used for 2FA.
messages.choose2FaEmailAddress: Select an email address that will be used for 2FA. It's highly recommended to use a non-primary email address.
messages.enterCodeSentInEmail: Enter the code sent to your email address.
messages.enterCodeSentBySms: Enter the code sent by SMS to your phone number.
messages.enterTotpCode: Enter a code from your authenticator app.
messages.verifyTotpCode: Scan the QR-code with your mobile authenticator app. If you have a trouble with scanning, you can enter the secret manually. After that you will see a 6-digit code in your application. Enter this code in the field below.
messages.generateAndSendNewPassword: A new password will be generated and sent to the user's email address.
messages.security2FaResetConfirmation: Are you sure you want to reset the current 2FA settings?
messages.auth2FARequired: You need to set up 2 factor authentication. Use an authenticator application on your mobile phone (e.g. Google Authenticator).
messages.ldapUserInEspoNotFound: User is not found in EspoCRM. Contact your administrator to create the user.
messages.passwordChangeRequestNotFound: The password change request is not found. It might be expired. Try to initiate a new password recovery from the [login page]({url}).
messages.defaultTeamIsNotUsers: Default Team should be one of user's Teams
